nodes.title: Sigmas Easing (cubic, sine, quad) don't mess with this tbh

widgets_values: A beautiful young East Asian woman with long, wavy dark hair stands centered against a simple, textured grey curtain background. She is directly facing the camera, her arms raised symmetrically. In each hand, she gently holds a large, fluffy white rabbit ear attached to a headband on her head. She wears a white, button-up cropped knit cardigan that reveals her midriff, and a multi-layered, charcoal grey ruffled mini skirt with a grey faux-fur trim at the hem. Her expression is calm and confident, looking straight at the camera. The setting is indoor, with soft, even lighting, and a faint background room ambience is audible. After holding the pose, a soft-tempo pop-ballad with a gentle piano melody and a confident female vocal begins to play softly in the background. Her gaze narrows slightly, and a playful smirk forms on her lips. She simultaneously releases her grip on both bunny ears, allowing her hands to drop. The bunny ears remain upright. A soft fwoosh of hair settling around her shoulders is heard, followed by the light rustle of her cardigan's knit fabric. *With a soft, knowing chuckle:* "I thought this might look ridiculous, but..." She lowers her hands to her hips, placing them on the waistband of her ruffled skirt, her fingers lightly gripping the fabric. She shifts her weight subtly from one leg to the other, causing the multiple layers of her skirt ruffles to bounce and sway with a distinct *click* and *rustle* sound. She maintains direct eye contact, her smirk widening. *With a direct, confident tone:* "...it's actually kind of perfect." A slow, small nod of approval is seen as she holds the final pose, the music swelling slightly. She makes a brief, final adjustment to one of the ears, a small sound of fabric on fabric, before letting her hand drop again. The camera pulls back slightly to show her full figure.
